name: Angela's Milanese
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg with water.
2. Dip the steak slices in the egg mixture.
3. Dredge the meat in bread crumbs.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet to a depth of 1/8 inch until very hot.
5. Brown the steak quickly, turning once, until golden brown. Add more oil if needed. Remove from the skillet and drain on paper towels. Wipe out the skillet.
6. Heat olive oil in the skillet to a depth of 1/16 inch until very hot.
7. Chop the garlic with salt and add it along with the chile peppers, lemon peel, and rosemary to the hot oil.
8. Sauté briefly, then add the tomato sauce and meat.
9. Cover the meat with the sauce and simmer over low heat for at least 30 minutes.
